languages.text: "Время важно лишь для подобных тебе недолговечных созданий. Запомни до конца своей скоротечной жизни: все идет по плану! Все всегда идет по моему плану..."

"Time holds value only for short-lived creatures such as you. Mark this well until the end of your transient existence: everything is going according to plan! Everything always goes according to my plan..."
languages.original_text: "Время важно лишь для подобных тебе недолговечных созданий. Запомни до конца своей скоротечной жизни: все идет по плану! Все всегда идет по моему плану..."

traits.locale_text: "Time holds value only for short-lived creatures such as you. Mark this well until the end of your transient existence: everything is going according to plan! Everything always goes according to my plan..."

"Time holds value only for short-lived creatures such as you. Mark this well until the end of your transient existence: everything is going according to plan! Everything always goes according to my plan..."

"Time holds value only for short-lived creatures such as you. Mark this well until the end of your transient existence: everything is going according to plan! Everything always goes according to my plan..."

"Time holds value only for short-lived creatures such as you. Mark this well until the end of your transient existence: everything is going according to plan! Everything always goes according to my plan..."

languages.text: «El tiempo solo tiene valor para los seres efímeros como tú. Ten en cuenta lo siguiente durante el resto de tu limitada vida: ¡todo va según lo planeado! Todo sale siempre según mis planes...».
languages.original_text: "Time holds value only for short-lived creatures such as you. Mark this well until the end of your transient existence: everything is going according to plan! Everything always goes according to my plan..."

traits.locale_text: «El tiempo solo tiene valor para los seres efímeros como tú. Ten en cuenta lo siguiente durante el resto de tu limitada vida: ¡todo va según lo planeado! Todo sale siempre según mis planes...».

languages.text: “时间只对你们这种短命种族有价值。好好记住这句话，直至你那短暂生命的终点：一切都在按计划进行！一切都在按我的计划进行……”
languages.original_text: "Time holds value only for short-lived creatures such as you. Mark this well until the end of your transient existence: everything is going according to plan! Everything always goes according to my plan..."

traits.locale_text: “时间只对你们这种短命种族有价值。好好记住这句话，直至你那短暂生命的终点：一切都在按计划进行！一切都在按我的计划进行……”

languages.text: "Die Zeit schert sich nur um kurzlebige Kreaturen wie Euch. Merkt Euch das bis zum Ende Eurer flüchtigen Existenz: Alles verläuft nach Plan! Es verläuft immer alles nach meinem Plan ..."
languages.original_text: "Time holds value only for short-lived creatures such as you. Mark this well until the end of your transient existence: everything is going according to plan! Everything always goes according to my plan..."

traits.locale_text: "Die Zeit schert sich nur um kurzlebige Kreaturen wie Euch. Merkt Euch das bis zum Ende Eurer flüchtigen Existenz: Alles verläuft nach Plan! Es verläuft immer alles nach meinem Plan ..."

languages.text: « Le temps n'a de valeur qu'aux yeux des créatures éphémères telles que vous. Gardez bien ceci à l'esprit jusqu'à la fin de votre brève existence : tout se passe comme prévu ! Tout se déroule toujours exactement selon mes plans... »
languages.original_text: "Time holds value only for short-lived creatures such as you. Mark this well until the end of your transient existence: everything is going according to plan! Everything always goes according to my plan..."

traits.locale_text: « Le temps n'a de valeur qu'aux yeux des créatures éphémères telles que vous. Gardez bien ceci à l'esprit jusqu'à la fin de votre brève existence : tout se passe comme prévu ! Tout se déroule toujours exactement selon mes plans... »

languages.text: "Zaman ancak senin gibi kısa ömürlü yaratıklar için değer taşır. Geçici varoluşunun sonuna dek şunu iyi belle: Her şey plana göre işliyor! Her şey her zaman benim planıma göre işler..."
languages.original_text: "Time holds value only for short-lived creatures such as you. Mark this well until the end of your transient existence: everything is going according to plan! Everything always goes according to my plan..."

traits.locale_text: "Zaman ancak senin gibi kısa ömürlü yaratıklar için değer taşır. Geçici varoluşunun sonuna dek şunu iyi belle: Her şey plana göre işliyor! Her şey her zaman benim planıma göre işler..."

languages.text: 「時間を持つ価値は、あなたのような短命の生き物だけにある。この短い命の終わりまで覚えておけ。すべては計画通りに進行している！すべてはいつも私の計画通りに進む…」
languages.original_text: "Time holds value only for short-lived creatures such as you. Mark this well until the end of your transient existence: everything is going according to plan! Everything always goes according to my plan..."

traits.locale_text: 「時間を持つ価値は、あなたのような短命の生き物だけにある。この短い命の終わりまで覚えておけ。すべては計画通りに進行している！すべてはいつも私の計画通りに進む…」
